channel.title: My Learn-Improve Blog
channel.description: Recent content on My Learn-Improve Blog

item.title: About Fundamentals
item.description: Programs What Is The Program? The meaning of the program is the executable text specific to hardware of the devices. 1 and 0 codes are run as much as the processor of the device acceptes. If we examine the working of the program with an example : When a program with .exe extension or a program is run in a diffrent operating systems, certain commands are sent to the processor simultaneously with the execution of the binary codes of this program.
